characters.name: Agent 257
characters.description: Agent 257Background informationFirst episode"Episode 257-494"VoiceJeff BennettCharacter informationSpeciesHumanOccupationSecret AgentRivalsControl FreakWeaponsLaser Watch Agent 257is a television character that appeared in "Episode 257-494". He is a reference toJames Bond. A short footage of the secret agent was seen during theTeen Titans' search forControl FreakinCook's Electronics, where the agent is shown fighting off-camera enemies on top of the Eiffel Tower inParis, before jumping off the tower and flying away on a glider.

characters.name: Alien probe
characters.description: Alien probeBackground informationFirst episode"Sisters"VoiceNoneCharacter informationReal nameN/ASpeciesRobotTheAlien Probesare highly advanced robots utilized as weapons by the Centauri Police that went to Earth to captureBlackfire. In "Sisters", four probes were sent by the Centauri Police officers,KaiandCron, to Earth to catch aTamaraneancriminal responsible for a series of thefts in their space sector. One of the probes managed to findStarfireand attempted to capture her. However, it was destroyed byRobin. The Centauri Police then tracked down the site where the probe was destroyed and concluded that their criminal (which should have beenBlackfire) is on that location. During a disco party, Starfire once again encountered the probes and could not free herself this time. In retaliation, the Titans could not make a scratch on the probes, however Blackfire was able to destroy the probes easily with her blackbolts.

characters.name: Aquagirl
characters.description: AquagirlBackground informationFirst comic"Graduation Day"Character informationReal nameTulaSpeciesAtlanteanAffiliationsTeen TitansThe Kingdom of AtlantisPlace of OriginAtlantisAlliesAqualad Aquagirlis a young superhero from Atlantis who was invited to join the Titans following the attack byPrivate H.I.V.E.and his Army Brats. Aquagirl first appeared in "Graduation Day" as a prospective new recruit for theTeen Titans. It can be assumed she joined up soon after. She was later seen in the last issue ofTeen Titans Go!as a chibi withAqualad.

characters.name: Aqualad
characters.description: AqualadBackground informationFirst episode"Deep Six"VoiceWil Wheaton(English)Alfonso Soto (Latin American Spanish)Sérgio Cantú (Brazilian Portuguese)Character informationReal nameGarthOther namesAquadude (by Beast Boy)Unitard Guy (by Speedy)SpeciesAtlanteanAffiliationsTitans EastTeen TitansThe Kingdom of AtlantisPlace of OriginAtlantisResidenceSteel CityRelativesKing Thar (father; deceased)Queen Berra (mother)Slizzath (uncle; deceased)AlliesTramm(partner)BumblebeeSpeedy(rival)Más y MenosBeast Boy(close friend/rival)RobinStarfire(former admirer)Raven(former admirer)CyborgWildebeestHot SpotAquaman(king and former mentor)Powers and abilitiesHydrokinesisAquatic life manipulationSuperhuman strengthHigh durabilitySuperhuman swimmingWater transformationUnderwater breathing & pressure resistanceWeaponsNearby water Aqualadis a young superhero from Atlantis, the former sidekick ofAquaman, and a founding member ofTitans East. Aqualad is a marine telepath who once lived in the utopia of Atlantis. He can communicate with fish using his telepathic powers, though these powers are susceptible to nullification from the human-affecting psychic ones ofBrother Blood.

characters.name: Arella
characters.description: ArellaBackground informationFirst episode"The Prophecy"First comic"Red Raven"VoiceVirginia MadsenCharacter informationReal nameAngela RothSpeciesHumanAffiliationsThe Monks of AzarathGoalTo protect her daughter from TrigonPlace of OriginGotham CityResidenceAzarathRelativesTrigon(ex-fiance)Raven(daughter)AlliesRavenAzarMonks ofAzarathPowers and abilitiesSorceress Abilities Arella Rothwas a denizen of the extra-dimensional mystical realm ofAzarathand the late human mother ofRaven. Arella is a very peaceful, controlled, motherly woman, but also rather fatalistic like her daughter, mainly due to the part she had unwittingly played in Trigon's scheme of bearing his demon/human hybrid illegitimate daughter who was prophesied to ensure his domination over Earth.

characters.name: Armadillo Man
characters.description: The title of this article is conjectural. Armadillo ManBackground informationFirst episode"Episode 257-494"VoiceJeff Bennett TheArmadillo Manis an actor and host of an unnamed children's television show featured in "Episode 257-494". During the man's performance, he was elbowed off camera byControl Freak, who was invading the television dimension. A standoff ensued between Control Freak againstRavenandRobin. As Robin shouted "Freeze!", the man announced that the former had triggered the show's "Sloppy Mess Word" which rained oatmeal onto the Titans.

characters.name: Arsenal
characters.description: ArsenalBackground informationFirst comic"Wrong Place, Wrong Time"Character informationAffiliationsTeen TyrantsRivalsBrotherhood of Justice Arsenalis aTeen Tyrantand the evil doppelganger ofSpeedy. He has not appeared in the cartoon at all. His only appearance was in issue #48 "Wrong Place, Wrong Time" of theTeen Titans Go!comic series. WhenRavensentKillowat(misspelled as Kilowatt in this issue) to a parallel Earth, thinking that she would send him to his home universe, she made a mistake and sent him to the Teen Tyrants' universe. He was spotted by Arsenal and Tempest, and after a brief chase, Arsenal shot an arrow at Killowat, which caused bubbles to form around him and trap him. They then shocked him with some wires, which knocked him unconscious. They took the captured Titan to their base and started to interrogate him for information about theBrotherhood of Justice(in this universe, good versions of theBrotherhood of Evil). Raven, realizing her mistake, teleported theTeen Titansto the Tyrant's universe, where they fought and lost. As soon as the Tyrant's were about to cross over to the Titans' universe, Gemini (disguised as Blackfire) unveiled herself and the Brotherhood of Justice came and defeated the Tyrants. The good version ofMammothdefeated Arsenal. It is unknown what became of Arsenal and the Teen Tyrants afterwards.

characters.name: Atlas
characters.description: AtlasBackground informationFirst episode"Only Human"First comicSecret MovesVoiceKeith DavidCharacter informationReal nameAtlasOther namesChamp, ChampionSpeciesRobotAffiliationsTheBrotherhood of EvilGoalTo win any competitionResidence(formerly) TheOld Stadium,Jump CityAllies(Formerly)Spike,Master of Games,Control Freak,Andre Le BlancPowers and abilitiesRobotic body providing superhuman strength and resilienceWeaponsVarious energy weapons kept outside his body Atlasis a robotic villain and an enemy of theTeen Titans. Atlas' first appearance was in "Only Human". WhenCyborgbeat him in a video game, Atlas demanded a rematch. However, he wanted to fight him hand to hand, not online. Atlas defeated him multiple times, owing to Cyborg's inability reach more than 100% because he was half robot. However, Cyborg found that it was his will that let him go over 100% in the past, so Cyborg used this as knowledge to defeat Atlas. He was defeated becauseSpikehad left him and Atlas did not know how to fix his armor himself.

characters.name: Bob
characters.description: BobBackground informationFirst episode"Employee of the Month"VoiceTom KaneCharacter informationOther namesBobSpeciesNewfuAffiliationsThe SourceGoalTo collect cows and destroyEarthPlace of originAlien creation consisting ofNewfuResidenceJump City,Mega Meaty Meatrestaurant (temporarily)RelativesThe Source (creator), BobsAlliesIts numerous brothersPowers and abilitiesShape-shiftingFood creationRegenerationWeaponsNone Bob, a being made entirely out ofNewfu, is the servant ofThe Sourceand a special enemy ofBeast Boy. Bob is an entity created by the Source, the leader of an alien task force which came toEarthto collect power sources for their technology - which happened to be plain live cows. In order to coordinate its activities, it disguised its mothership as a newly founded fast-food restaurant,Mega Meaty Meat. From there it sent out collector ships to collect cows from the outlying farms and created an entity from its own substance named Bob, who posed as the restaurant's manager. After having collected enough cows, the Source intended to use a super weapon called Destruct-o-tron to destroy the Earth for good measure as well. To complete its disguise, the Source used its own body substance as a "nutritious meat-free" replacement for the scarce-growing meat.

characters.name: Bobby
characters.description: BobbyBackground informationFirst episode"Hide and Seek"Character informationReal nameBobbyOther namesMelvin's "imaginary" friendSpeciesManifested giant bearAffiliationsMelvin,Timmy Tantrum,Teether,Teen TitansPlace of OriginCreated by Melvin's powerResidenceA monks' templeRelativesMelvin (creator)Timmy TantrumTeetherAlliesRaven, Melvin, Timmy Tantrum, TeetherPowers and abilitiesInvisibilitySuper StrengthHigh ResilienceSharp ClawsSuperhuman EnduranceEnhanced Jumps Bobbyis a living stuffed bear andMelvin's best friend and, along with her and her fellow youngsters,TimmyandTeether, an Honorary Titan. Melvin, Timmy and Teether are three young children gifted with super powers. Because of the threat they posed, theBrotherhood of Evildecided to have them kidnapped and eliminated. The Titans learned of this plan, however, and arranged for the three to be brought to a safe place. Because the other members were busy dealing with various Brotherhood schemes,Ravenwas entrusted with the task.

characters.name: Brotherhood of Evil
characters.description: Brotherhood of EvilThe Brotherhood of Evil in "Friends and Foes" statsMembersThe Brain(Main/Leader)Monsieur Mallah(Main/Second-In-Command)Madame Rouge(Main)General Immortus(Main)Full list of membersBaseParis, FranceFirst appearance"Homecoming - Part 1" TheBrotherhood of Evilis an evil organization bent on world domination led byThe Brainand his associatesMonsieur Mallah,Madame Rouge, andGeneral Immortus, and are the main antagonists ofSeason 5. Their plan is to eliminate theDoom Patroland take over the world. The Brotherhood of Evil has been attacking the universe for years and has been an old enemy of the Doom Patrol. However, their new main enemy becomes the Titans after "Homecoming - Part 2". After the Brain decided that the Titans were a bigger threat than the Doom Patrol, he attempted to eliminate all the Titans from the Earth. They are also known as the arch-nemeses ofBeast Boy. The emblem of Brotherhood of Evil

However, their new main enemy becomes the Titans after "Homecoming - Part 2". characters.name: Brotherhood of Justice
characters.description: Brotherhood of JusticeMembersGeminiMammothGeneral ImmortusDoctor LightPsimonFirst appearanceWrong Place, Wrong TimeTheBrotherhood of Justiceare a group of superheroes residing in the parallel universe ofJump City. They are heroic counterparts of theBrotherhood of Eviland their enemies are theTeen Tyrants, the evil counterparts of theTeen Titans. The Brotherhood of Justice make their only appearance inissue # 48inTeen Titans Go!, where they are implied to be the only superheroes remaining after the Teen Tyrants conquered their version of Jump City. Gemini, a member of the Brotherhood of Justice, is a member of the Teen Tyrants, but is actually spying on them. After the Teen Titans invade the Teen Tyrants' universe to save Killowat, they are confronted by the Teen Tyrants and are defeated by Red Raven's powers. At this moment, Gemini uses this chance to betray the Teen Tyrants and opens the door to reveal her teammates on the other side. Due to their superior abilities, the Brotherhood of Justice are able to distract and defeat the Teen Tyrants, giving the Teen Titans time to successfully rescueKillowatdespite Robin's insistence that he and his team help Gemini. They aren't seen again as Raven permanently closed the portal to their world shortly after retrieving Killowat. Gemini- A member of the Brotherhood of Justice. Granted with shapeshifting powers, Gemini serves as the team's infiltrator, assuming the identity of Blackfire in order to gather information of the Teen Tyrants' whereabouts. She is the Teen Tyrants' universal counterpart ofBeast Boy.  She also bears a resemblance toMadame Rouge.
